name: TestResetSysVarValue
title: TestResetSysVarValue
description: Resets the system variable to initial value. If no initial value is defined, the system variable is not set.

parameters.name: aSysVar
parameters.description: System variable that should be reset.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
